aboutPage.title: About PDFTrusted
aboutPage.subtitle: PDFTrusted (https://pdftrusted.com) is a secure, fast, utility-driven PDF tool suite built for real-world document workflows.
aboutPage.p1: We built PDFTrusted so anyone can merge, split, compress, convert, sign, and edit PDFs without installing desktop software. The product is designed around speed and clarity: open a tool, complete your task, and download the result. Core processing runs in your browser whenever possible, which keeps routine document work private and responsive.
aboutPage.p2: Our mission is to make dependable PDF utilities accessible to individuals, teams, and educators while staying transparent about what happens to your data. The public website is delivered globally through Cloudflare’s network for reliability and performance. Optional Google sign-in exists only to make returning to your workspace easier — it does not change our core stance that your PDF content is yours, and we do not use your documents to train models or build marketing profiles from file contents.
aboutPage.whyDesc: Too many PDF sites are slow, cluttered, or vague about privacy. PDFTrusted focuses on straightforward tools, honest disclosures, and a calm user experience you can trust for day-to-day work.

cards.secureDesc: We prioritize browser-side processing for core tools and minimize what touches the server.
cards.privacyDesc: We do not archive your PDFs as a product feature; see our Privacy Policy for account and OAuth details.
cards.availableDesc: Use PDFTrusted on modern browsers across desktop and mobile.

highlights.noStorageDesc: We do not operate a “cloud drive” for your uploads. Files are used for processing and cleared from active memory when your task finishes.
highlights.freeDesc: We keep the essential toolkit approachable and clearly labeled so you know what each tool does.
highlights.clientDesc: Many workflows complete entirely on your device; server features are limited to what the tool requires (for example, authentication or large uploads when enabled).

faq.safeA: PDFTrusted uses browser-first processing on supported tools. Optional cloud features use encrypted transfer and automatic cleanup per our Privacy Policy. Choose the processing path shown before you start a job.
faq.storeA: No. We do not store your uploads. Files are processed in memory and removed immediately after the task completes. Our service is designed around No File Storage and maximum user privacy.
faq.freeA: PDFTrusted is free to use for core PDF tools. We keep the service accessible with no hidden fees, and our priority is a transparent browser-based experience for every user.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: How PDFTrusted at https://pdftrusted.com handles your information — including optional Google sign-in — and how we protect your trust.

sections.privacyFirstDesc: PDFTrusted is designed so everyday PDF work stays on your device whenever the selected tool allows it. This policy explains what we do when you browse the site, when you optionally authenticate, and how third-party infrastructure fits in.
sections.clientDesc: Many tools process files directly in your browser. In those cases, the contents of your PDF are not sent to our application servers for conversion logic. You should still avoid processing highly sensitive documents on shared or untrusted devices.
sections.storageDesc: We do not operate a consumer cloud storage product for your PDFs. Outputs are generated for you to download; we do not keep a personal document archive tied to casual site use.
sections.secureItem1: We use HTTPS for the public site at https://pdftrusted.com.
sections.secureItem2: Core tools do not require an account. If you choose Google sign-in, only the profile data described below is used.
sections.secureItem3: Infrastructure providers may process network signals (for example IP metadata) as part of delivering the service; see “Hosting & sessions”.
sections.googleOAuthIntro: If you choose “Sign in with Google,” authentication is handled by Google and by Auth.js (JWT sessions) on our side. We use this flow only to recognize your account on PDFTrusted — not to read the contents of your Google Drive or Gmail.
sections.googleOAuthItem1: Data received from Google typically includes a stable subject identifier, email address, and name as permitted by your Google account settings.
sections.googleOAuthItem2: We store this sign-in information only insofar as needed to maintain your session (for example inside signed session cookies / JWT claims such as user id, email, and display name).
sections.googleOAuthItem3: Google’s processing of your credentials is governed by Google’s policies; please review Google Account security and privacy controls separately.
sections.googleOAuthItem4: You can stop using Google sign-in at any time by signing out and, if you wish, revoking PDFTrusted’s access from your Google account settings.
sections.googleOAuthItem5: We do not sell your Google profile data and we do not use your PDF file contents for advertising personalization.
sections.hostingDesc: The website and API are served from Cloudflare’s globally distributed network (“the edge”). Static pages (such as this Privacy Policy) are pre-built files without a traditional SQL database dependency. Session cookies issued for authentication are HTTP-only and scoped for secure use with our origin. If you use email/password registration where offered, minimal account records may be stored in Cloudflare R2 as small encrypted or hashed artifacts — not mixed with your PDF processing buffers.
sections.contactPrivacyDesc: Questions about this policy: support@pdftrusted.com. Please include enough detail for us to help, without attaching confidential documents unless we explicitly request them.

faq.storeA: We do not provide a personal PDF hosting product. For typical browser tools, files are used transiently for processing and are not kept as an ongoing library on our servers.
faq.collectA: Beyond standard web telemetry that hosting and analytics partners may collect (such as IP-derived data, user agent, and security logs), we only receive personal identifiers when you authenticate. With Google OAuth we may process your Google user id, email, and name to maintain your session. We do not use your document text to build user profiles.
faq.adsA: Google AdSense may serve ads on PDFTrusted. Ad delivery is governed by Google’s advertising policies and your Google ad settings. PDF processing for supported tools remains separate from ad targeting logic.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: These Terms govern your use of PDFTrusted at https://pdftrusted.com. By using the site, you agree to this agreement and our Privacy Policy.

sections.usingDesc: PDFTrusted provides online PDF utilities intended for lawful personal and business use. You agree not to misuse the service, not to attempt to disrupt or probe our infrastructure beyond normal browsing, and not to use automated means to overload the site without written permission.
sections.responsibilityDesc: You are solely responsible for the legality of the documents you process and for obtaining any necessary rights from third parties. Do not use PDFTrusted to violate copyright, export controls, privacy laws, or any applicable regulation.
sections.availabilityDesc: We strive to keep the service online but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Features may change, rotate, or be retired as we improve the product. The canonical public site is https://pdftrusted.com; www.pdftrusted.com may redirect to this origin.
sections.thirdPartyDesc: PDFTrusted relies on vendors such as Cloudflare (network and object storage where configured), Google (optional OAuth sign-in and advertising where enabled), and analytics or error-reporting tools you can control via browser settings. Those vendors process limited technical data under their own terms.
sections.accountsDesc: Some features may require authentication. If you create a credential-based account where offered, you are responsible for safeguarding your password. If you use Google OAuth, your use of Google’s login service remains subject to Google’s terms. You must provide accurate information and notify us if you become aware of unauthorized account use.
sections.serviceHostDesc: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT RESULTS WILL BE ERROR-FREE OR SUITABLE FOR LEGAL, MEDICAL, OR REGULATED USE CASES.
sections.liabilityDesc: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, PDFTRUSTED AND ITS OPERATORS WILL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES, OR FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH YOUR USE OF THE SITE. OUR AGGREGATE LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIM RELATING TO THE SERVICE WILL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNTS YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE MONTHS BEFORE THE CLAIM OR (B) FIFTY U.S. DOLLARS (US$50) IF YOU HAVE NOT PAID US.

faq.freeA: Yes. Core PDF tools are available for free. We offer a transparent service with no hidden costs for basic document processing.
faq.uploadA: Avoid uploading highly sensitive or confidential documents if you are concerned about privacy. Although PDFTrusted protects files locally, you should always use best judgment for sensitive content.
faq.businessQ: Can I use PDFTrusted for business documents?
faq.businessA: Yes. PDFTrusted is designed for both personal and professional use, but it is not a substitute for specialized enterprise-grade document management systems.

scanner.seoTitle: Escáner de Documentos Gratis — Foto a PDF (Offline)
scanner.seoDesc: Escáner online para recibos y documentos: brillo y contraste automáticos, recorte en perspectiva y exportación vertical. 100% en el navegador con algoritmos al estilo OpenCV — sin subidas.
scanner.heroSubtitle: Pipeline gratuito y seguro de foto a escaneo — la corrección de perspectiva y la mejora se ejecutan localmente.
scanner.dropLabel: Suelta una foto de tu documento
scanner.dropSub: JPG, PNG o WebP — procesado localmente en tu dispositivo
scanner.resultPlaceholder: Ejecuta el escáner para previsualizar el resultado.
scanner.statusProcessing: Procesando tu escaneo de forma privada en el navegador…
scanner.statusFootnote: Incluye al menos {{seconds}} segundos de progreso visible para una experiencia consistente.
scanner.faq1: Las fotos permanecen en tu dispositivo — la detección y mejora se ejecutan en el navegador (OpenCV.js + Canvas).
scanner.faq2: La corrección de perspectiva detecta los bordes cuando es posible; si no, se mejora la foto completa.
scanner.faq3: El modo vertical rota capturas amplias para una lectura cómoda en móvil; combínalo con el editor de PDF.

errors.generic: No se pudo procesar esta imagen. Prueba con otra foto o desactiva la corrección de perspectiva.
